name: WebEx: Taking Conferencing to the Business Communications Summit
description: Aberdeen Group vendor profile of WebEx Communications, analyzing its emergence as leader in high-end Web conferencing. Documents WebEx's third-generation Mediatone infrastructure and private WAN architecture as key differentiators versus competitors. Covers the five-level Aberdeen model for real-time business communications, new Training Center service, multimedia capabilities (UCF, Access Anywhere, multipoint video), and the market shift away from face-to-face meetings accelerated by the 2001 recession and post-9/11 travel concerns. At April 2002, WebEx had 5,000+ customers growing at 800+ per quarter.
